title: OCI Security List Allows All Protocols
description: Detects security list updates that allow all protocols (protocol=all) from any source, creating an overly permissive network configuration that violates STIG network segmentation requirements.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.createsecuritylist' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.virtualnetwork.updatesecuritylist') and 'Original Log Content' like '*"protocol":"all"*'))
falsepositives: Network infrastructure changes during maintenance windows
